name: code
description: Single fenced code block as the slide's centerpiece.
purpose: Use when the code IS the slide — an API snippet, a config example, a migration. For comparing two versions, use compare-code.

## What the new endpoint looks like.

```js
app.post('/api/v2/auth', async (req, res) => {
  const session = await issueSession(req.body);
  res.json({ session });
});
```
